events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947, in Hampton, Middlesex, England.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943, in Dartford, Kent, England.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: The iconic Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today! What's your go-to Stones track to get you moving?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV's Big Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! An absolute game-changer. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, in Bethel, New York, attracting over 400,000 people.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival began – three days of peace, music, and mud that defined a generation. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and died six days later, on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the immense talent of Tupac Shakur. His influence on music and culture remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Tribute to Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His guitar changed everything.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road's Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks still sound as fresh as ever. What's your favourite from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The voice of The Pretenders, still rocking after all these years.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Always a force to be reckoned with. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971, in the US, and in conjunction with the album 'Shaved Fish' in the UK in 1975. The album 'Imagine' was released on September 9, 1971, in the US and October 8, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine's Enduring Message
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate globally. What does this timeless anthem mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, which began shipping on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's Quarter Century
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist, was born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, England.

angles.name: Lennon's Enduring Spirit
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and screenwriter John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939, in Weston-super-Mare, Somerset, England.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
